name: Cheese Sauce with Beer
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the jack cheese, cheddar cheese, flour, dry mustard, and paprika in a bowl. Toss to mix well.
2. In a saucepan over medium-low heat, combine the beer and liquid hot pepper sauce.
3. Add the cheese mixture to the saucepan, stirring constantly until melted.
4. Stir in the milk.
5. Serve warm.
